cleavage agent: the digestion enzyme was set as semiTrypsin
fragmentation method: each MS1 scan was followed by Higher-energy collisional dissociation (HCD)
instrument: coupled to an Orbitrap Fusion Lumos (Thermo Scientific) mass spectrometer
labeling: the processing defect observed in the parental PM Xapt line results in a processing defect in conversion of the SUB1 54 kDa intermediate to the mature 47 kDa form
